name: codex-tomogatchi
description: A local Codex virtual pet that grows from privacy-safe Codex activity counters.

interface.shortDescription: Grow a Codex pet from your coding sessions
interface.longDescription: Codex Tomogatchi records privacy-safe local activity counters, turns those counters into XP, care calls, stats, and evolution paths, and renders a live original virtual pet overlay.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my Codex Tomogatchi can evolve
